title: Smoked Turkey Stir Fry
description: A savory and flavorful stir fry made with smoked turkey, stir-fried vegetables, and a hint of Korean spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of buttery stir-fry sauce in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the smoked turkey neck and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers and carrots and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped green onions, minced garlic, and Korean chili flakes. Cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the goey soy sauce and brown sugar. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional green onions and chopped nuts, if desired.
